recent_form_summary: Excellent grass form, reached her first grass final of the season without losing a set until the final two; beat Golubic 7-6(5) 6-2 in the semifinal.
stat_trend_summary: Hit 20 aces across four Nottingham matches (~5/match), including 3 vs Golubic; 2026 season average is only ~2.1/match -- grass is clearly boosting her rate.
opponent_factor_summary: Bouzkova is a scrappy but not elite returner; no prior H2H exists between them, so this leans on Bouzkova's modest return numbers.
notes: Tournament-week ace rate (~5/match) clears the 1.5 line with real margin, and her serve has clearly picked up on grass relative to her season average; no injury concerns, dropped only 2 sets all week.
